description: Submit a new story to Hacker News with title and URL. Requires authenticated session. Respects HN submission rules (no duplicate URLs, appropriate titles).
author: stillwater

reasoning.research: HN submit page (/submit) has a simple form: input[name='title'] for title, input[name='url'] for URL, and textarea[name='text'] for text submissions (Ask HN, Show HN). Submit button is input[type='submit']. On successful submission, redirected to /item?id={story_id}. On duplicate URL, HN shows 'That link was already submitted' with a link to the existing submission.
reasoning.selector_strategy: Navigate to hn.algolia.com/submit after loading session. Form fields: input[name='title'], input[name='url']. Submit: input[type='submit']. Verify success by checking URL redirect to /item?id=. HN's form is pure HTML — no JavaScript tricks needed.
reasoning.anti_bot_notes: HN rate limits submissions: 1 story per 4 hours for new accounts. Requires karma >= 1 to submit. Story titles must not contain all-caps words or exclamation marks. Human-like typing speeds recommended. Login via session cookie required.
reasoning.performance: Navigation 2s + form fill ~10s + submit 2s + verify 2s = ~16s total.

title.description: Story title. Should not be in ALL CAPS. No excessive punctuation.
title.example: Show HN: My open source browser automation tool

url.description: URL to submit. Must be unique (HN rejects duplicate URLs within 1 year).

text.description: Text for Ask HN or Show HN (used when no URL provided)
text.example: I've been building this for 6 months and wanted to share it with the community...

steps.description: Verify authenticated — form must show title field. If login page, abort.
Capture URL of newly submitted story

title.example: Show HN: My open source browser automation tool

error_handling.session_expired: Detect ycombinator.com/login redirect — run hn-login recipe first
error_handling.duplicate_url: Detect 'already submitted' message — return DUPLICATE_URL with existing story link
error_handling.rate_limited: HN enforces 4h between submissions — detect 'too many submissions' error
error_handling.karma_too_low: Detect karma requirement message — need karma >= 1 to submit
error_handling.invalid_title: Detect title error — title must not be all-caps or contain special chars
